stemHtml: Select the statement that represents an example of top-down processing.

options.a: A pilot feels that the aircraft is banking and subconsciously pushes the control column in the opposite direction.
options.b: A pilot hears an alert in the cockpit and quickly turns his head to identify the issue.
options.c: A pilot hears a low-RPM warning and, without conscious deliberation, initiates the RPM recovery manoeuvre.
options.d: A pilot sees a flashing warning light and reads the associated checklist.
